originalTitle: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
summary: With Memorial day weekend kicking off the travel season, we’re seeing a lot of deals pop up on travel gadgets, from portable power banks to noise-canceling headphones. One of the best right now is Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter, which lets you use your wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems so you can […]
content: With Memorial day weekend kicking off the travel season, we’re seeing a lot of deals pop up on travel gadgets, from portable power banks to noise-canceling headphones. One of the best right now is Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter, which lets you use your wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems so you can enjoy your flight a little more. It’s currently down to $49.99 ($10 off) at Amazon and directly from Twelve South, which is one of its best prices to date. [Product: Twelve South AirFly Pro 2 | https://www.amazon.com/Bluetooth-Wireless-Transmitter-Receiver-Headphones/dp/B0DWT9FM4J/?tag=theverge02-20, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.twelvesouth.com%2Fproducts%2Fairfly-pro-2] The Bluetooth transmitter lets you ditch the airline’s wired earbuds in favor of your own Bluetooth headphones or earbuds, which makes for a much better in-flight listening experience. All you need to do is plug the AirFly Pro 2 into the headphone jack on a seatback entertainment system, pair your headphones, and you’re set. It also supports two pairs of headphones at once, so you can watch movies or listen to podcasts with a travel companion.  As Twelve South’s premium AirFly model, the Pro 2 also adds a few welcome improvements that make it even easier to use. That includes the cheaper AirFly SE’s dedicated onboard volume controls as well as an upgraded processor, which enables faster pairing and improved sound quality with less background noise. Its battery should also last up to 25 hours on a single charge, which should comfortably last you through even the longest flights. The AirFly Pro 2 remains useful long after you land, too. As it works with any standard audio jack, you can also use it to connect your wireless headphones to devices like a Nintendo Switch , older car stereos, and even compatible gym equipment like treadmills.
chineseTitle: 十二南的 AirFly Pro 2 在夏季旅行之前达到了最优惠的价格之一
chineseSummary: 随着阵亡将士纪念日周末拉开了旅行季的序幕，我们看到从便携式充电宝到降噪耳机等旅行小工具出现了大量促销活动。目前最好的产品之一是十二南方的 AirFly Pro 2 蓝牙适配器，它可以让您将无线耳机与机上娱乐系统一起使用，这样您就可以[...]
chineseContent: 随着阵亡将士纪念日周末拉开了旅行季的序幕，我们看到从便携式充电宝到降噪耳机等旅行小工具出现了大量促销活动。目前最好的产品之一是十二南方的 AirFly Pro 2 蓝牙适配器，它可以让您将无线耳机与机上娱乐系统配合使用，让您可以更多地享受飞行。目前在 Amazon 上以及直接从 Twelve South 购买的价格已降至 49.99 美元（折扣 10 美元），这是迄今为止最优惠的价格之一。 【产品：十二南AirFly Pro 2 | https://www.amazon.com/Bluetooth-Wireless-Transmitter-Receiver-Headphones/dp/B0DWT9FM4J/?tag=theverge02-20， https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.twelvesouth.com%2Fproducts%2Fairfly-pro-2] 蓝牙发射器可让您放弃航空公司的有线耳塞，转而使用自己的蓝牙耳机或耳塞，从而获得更好的飞行聆听体验。您所需要做的就是将 AirFly Pro 2 插入座椅靠背娱乐系统上的耳机插孔，配对耳机，然后就可以了。它还支持同时使用两副耳机，因此您可以与旅行伴侣一起观看电影或收听播客。  作为十二南的高级 AirFly 型号，Pro 2 还添加了一些受欢迎的改进，使其更易于使用。其中包括更便宜的 AirFly SE 专用板载音量控制以及升级的处理器，可实现更快的配对并提高音质，同时减少背景噪音。其电池一次充电可持续使用长达 25 小时，即使是最长的飞行也能让您舒适地度过。 AirFly Pro 2 在您着陆后很长时间内仍然有用。由于它适用于任何标准音频插孔，因此您还可以使用它来连接无线耳机
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
